channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Megan Thee Stallion Ends Relationship with Klay Thompson Over Infidelity Allegations
item.description: Megan Thee Stallion has officially ended her relationship with NBA player Klay Thompson after about nine months together. The Grammy-winning rapper took to Instagram on 25 April 2026 to accuse Thompso...

item.title: Experts Criticize Australia's $4.2 Billion Investment in US Nuclear Submarines
item.description: A new contract between the US and Australia has stirred controversy as experts criticize Australia's $4.2 billion taxpayer-funded payment for nuclear-powered submarines. The deal, signed as part of th...

item.title: Erika Kirk evacuated safely after gunfire at White House Correspondents’ Dinner
item.description: Erika Kirk, widow of Charlie Kirk, was quickly escorted to safety after a gunman opened fire at the White House Correspondents’ Dinner held at the Washington Hilton on Saturday evening. The incident o...

item.title: Shooter detained after incident at White House Correspondents’ Association dinner
item.description: The White House Correspondents’ Association dinner at the Washington Hilton was disrupted when a gunman opened fire, forcing attendees to take cover and evacuate the venue. US President Donald Trump c...

item.title: Authorities Investigate Home Connected to WHCD Shooting Suspect
item.description: CNN reports from outside a residence connected to Cole Allen, the 31-year-old individual taken into custody by U.S. authorities following the shooting incident at the White House Correspondents’ Dinne...

item.title: Edwin Sifuna and Linda Mwananchi Team's Tour in Kisumu Sparks Political Tensions
item.description: The recent political rally by the ODM Linda Mwananchi team in Kisumu, led by Nairobi senator Edwin Sifuna, Siaya governor James Orengo, and Embakasi East MP Babu Owino, has caused mixed reactions amon...

item.title: Infowars Bankruptcy Plan Allows The Onion to Acquire Brand, Alex Jones Responds with Sandy Hook Attacks
item.description: Far-right figure Alex Jones is facing the imminent loss of his Infowars media empire due to spreading false and defamatory information about the families of the victims of the 2012 Sandy Hook Elementa...

item.title: Paralyzed Parrot Rides Drone to Fly Again
item.description: A heartwarming story from Davao City where a paralyzed lovebird parrot has made an inspiring return to flight, thanks to a drone. The bird, previously unable to fly due to its paralysis, now soars thr...

item.title: UAAP Season 88 3x3 tips off with FIBA-experienced players boosting competition
item.description: The UAAP Season 88 3x3 basketball tournament has officially opened, bringing renewed excitement to the collegiate halfcourt format. A key highlight of this year’s competition is the participation of p...

item.title: World Leaders Condemn Shooting at Washington Gala Attended by Trump
item.description: Things just dey happen! There was a serious drama on Saturday night for the White House Correspondents’ Dinner for Washington. A man, God for sake, came with a shotgun, a handgun, and even knives to a...

item.title: Heatwave and Thunderstorm Alerts Issued for Multiple Districts in Maharashtra
item.description: The India Meteorological Department (IMD) has issued weather alerts for multiple regions across Maharashtra, forecasting both heatwave-like conditions and thunderstorms in the coming days. Districts s...

item.title: Suspect Arrested After Shooting at White House Correspondents’ Dinner
item.description: On Saturday, a shooting incident happened during the White House Correspondents’ Dinner at the Washington Hilton Hotel. Authorities arrested the suspect, Cole Tomas Allen, a 31-year-old man from Torra...

item.title: Trump Links Assassination Threats to His Political Impact After White House Dinner Shooting
item.description: United States President Donald Trump don talk about why he believes say people don dey target him for assassination, following one shooting incident wey scatter a major event for Washington. The incid...

item.title: Drouillard Road in Windsor Temporarily Closed for Spring Flea Market
item.description: On Sunday, residents and visitors in Windsor should be aware that Drouillard Road will be closed to accommodate the Ford City BIA Spring Flea Market. The event, organised by the local Business Improve...

item.title: White House Correspondents’ Dinner evacuated after armed suspect detained
item.description: On Saturday night, the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner in Washington was disrupted when a man approached a security checkpoint armed with multiple weapons. According to US President Don...

item.title: Trump recounts reaction to attempted shooting at White House correspondents’ dinner
item.description: On Saturday night, US President Donald Trump spoke for the first time about the attempted shooting at the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner. He said that when the incident occurred, he in...

item.title: Sabastian Sawe breaks marathon's 2-hour barrier at London Marathon 2026
item.description: Kenyan athlete Sabastian Sawe made history at the 2026 London Marathon by becoming the first man to break the 2-hour barrier, finishing the race in a remarkable 1:59:30. This groundbreaking achievemen...

item.title: Drua Fullback's Mistake Gifts Chiefs an Easy Try
item.description: In a stunning moment during a Super Rugby match, Drua fullback Ilaisa Droasese made a costly mistake, delivering a 'mind-boggling' kick that handed the Chiefs a try. The play, which has already been d...

item.title: Pre-mixed Canned Cocktails Gain Popularity Among UK Gen Z Despite Lower Overall Drinking Rates
item.description: Despite perceptions that Generation Z are teetotal or cautious about drinking, pre-mixed canned cocktails such as BuzzBallz have become increasingly popular among young adults in the UK. Viral TikTok ...

item.title: Russell Brand Faces Criticism Over Bible Reading and Past Sexual Misconduct Confession
item.description: Russell Brand, 50, the English actor turned right-wing podcaster, faced online ridicule after a televised interview in which he struggled to find a relevant Bible passage during his appearance on Pier...
